推荐场景: 远程会议开场｜听懂议程
60秒任务: 「开场和议程」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Thanks for joining, everyone.（开场）
Let’s get started.（开始会议）
The main goal today is to ___.（说明目标）
We have three items on the agenda.（介绍议程）
First, we’ll cover ___. Then we’ll discuss ___.（流程安排）
Can everyone see the agenda?（确认屏幕/议程）
Let’s keep this focused.（控制范围）
We’re aiming to decide on ___ today.（明确决策目标）
If time allows, we’ll also touch on ___.（附加话题）
Does anyone need to add anything?（征求补充）
Let’s park unrelated topics for later.（暂缓无关话题）
We have ___ minutes for this part.（时间盒）
Can someone take notes?（安排记录）
By the end, we should have a clear next step.（会议产出）
Any quick questions before we begin?（开始前确认）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: agenda, goal, item, decision, note, topic, next step, timebox
Verbs: start, cover, discuss, add, park, decide, take notes, begin
Adjectives / Status: focused, clear, quick, unrelated, final, optional
Time / Place: today, by the end, later, in this meeting, on the screen
Chunks: time allows, park it, take notes, clear next step, agenda item
